properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v5 v5 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Here and now make it loud At the top of our lungs There's a sound breaking out Lord for all that You've done

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And now, we're turning our, turning our hearts to You And no, we'll never stop, never stop loving You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: This will be the best time of our lives As we encounter Your love again Here with You our hearts will come alive As we declare Your praises Woa-oh-oh-oh, woa-oh-oh-oh As we declare Your praises Woa-oh-oh-oh, woa-oh-oh-oh

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: From the start here we are To collide with Your love Every heart, set apart Just to be where You are

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: This is our time This is our place This is our moment to lift Your name
